tool_design.role_in_intervention: Turns the master matrix into the printed or digital customer-facing documents used for non-PPDS allergen information in service.
tool_design.usage_moment: When the first matrix is released and every time the master allergen information changes
tool_design.expected_output: Current customer-facing sign, allergen menu or reference sheet, and counter version footer aligned to the live matrix

failure_warnings.warning: The customer-facing pack is treated as a standalone document rather than an output from the master matrix.
failure_warnings.what_can_go_wrong: The counter pack says one thing while the master evidence says another.
early_signals: The pack has no version footer
Staff update the printed pack by hand
prevention: Generate this pack only from the live master matrix
Replace every copy when the version changes
mitigation: Pull all service copies and reissue the pack
Brief the team on which version is now live

failure_warnings.warning: The pack is technically present but hard for staff or customers to use under pressure.
failure_warnings.what_can_go_wrong: The venue has documentation but still gives slow or unclear allergen information in service.
early_signals: Staff cannot find the right item quickly
Customers are told to wait while papers are searched
prevention: Use clear layout by menu category and keep the pack at point of query
Test retrieval speed during staff briefings
mitigation: Split into categories or use a quick index page

content:
# Customer-Facing Allergen Info Pack

**Tool ID:** T005-05  
**Block:** B005 (Allergen Identification & Labelling)  
**Format:** Template  
**Primary Role:** Manager  
**Use Moment:** When the master matrix is first released and after every update  
**Output:** Customer notice, allergen menu/reference sheet, and version-controlled counter pack

---

## What This Tool Does

This pack is the customer-facing expression of the allergen source-of-truth for non-PPDS sale. It should be easy to find, easy to read, and clearly tied to the current master version.

Use the same version footer on every page in service.

---

## Part 1: Standard Customer Notice

Use this wording on a sign, menu footer, or display card.

> **Allergen Information**  
> Please speak to a team member before ordering if you have a food allergy or intolerance.  
> We keep a current allergen information file for our menu items.  
> Because ingredients and specials can change, please ask us to check the latest version.

| Footer Field | Complete Here |
|---|---|
| Matrix version referenced | |
| Effective from | |
| Last reviewed by | |

---

## Part 2: Counter Reference Cover Sheet

| Field | Complete Here |
|---|---|
| Pack title | |
| Current version | |
| Effective from | |
| Stored at | Till / Counter / Tablet / Host stand |
| Escalation contact if unclear | |

**Counter use rules**

<input type="checkbox" disabled /> Keep the pack at the point where customers ask questions  
<input type="checkbox" disabled /> Replace the full pack when the version changes  
<input type="checkbox" disabled /> Do not add handwritten changes unless the master is updated too  
<input type="checkbox" disabled /> If an item is missing, pause and escalate rather than guessing

---

## Part 3: Customer Allergen Menu Template

| Menu Item | Category | Declared Allergens | Key Caution or Cross-Contact Note | Version |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| | | | | |
| | | | | |
| | | | | |
| | | | | |
| | | | | |
| | | | | |

Use one or more pages as needed. Group by drinks, bakery, savoury, specials, and modifiers if that improves speed of use.

---

## Part 4: Update and Replacement Record

| Date | What Changed | Pack Reissued By | Counter Copy Replaced | Old Copy Removed |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| | | | Yes / No | Yes / No |
| | | | Yes / No | Yes / No |
| | | | Yes / No | Yes / No |

---

## Common Failure Patterns

### 1. The sign is present but the reference pack is missing
The notice only works if the detailed reference is available immediately.

### 2. The pack is present but nobody knows which version is live
Always show the same version footer used on the master matrix.

### 3. The pack is too dense for quick service use
If staff cannot find an item in seconds, reorganise it by category or add an index page.
